ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company's headquarters */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_cap" (
  "cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market capitalization entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the market capitalization belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the market capitalization was recorded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market capitalization is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_cap_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for nested sectors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for nested industries) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the access event occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User's browser and device information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the split belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the split occurred */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock split was announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mergers_acquisitions" (
  "merge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merger or acquisition event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the acquiring stock */,
  "acquired_stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the acquired stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Exchange ratio (e.g., 1:1, 2:3) */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the merger/acquisition was announced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the merger/acquisition (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mergers_acquisitions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mergers_acquisitions_acquired_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquired_stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes or comments about the stock in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
